about.p1: Hello! I'm majoring in Cross-platform Software Development. I consider myself a creative person who loves logical thinking and design. As a full-stack developer, I always try to combine these three aspects to create a scalable and responsive solutions.
about.course-desscription1: Course focused on hardware and software fundamentals, computer maintenance, and basic concepts of networking and technical support.
about.course-desscription2: English certification assessing listening and reading comprehension for everyday situations and professional environments.
